title: digitaria hispida
intro: Digitaria hispida is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is commonly known as finger grass or hairy finger grass. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Digitaria hispida include the ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Digitaria hispida include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are typically made by boiling the leaves and roots in water to create a medicinal tea or paste.
